title: Loran Spitball
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Loran Spitball''' was a tactic developed by [[Wraith Squadron]] specifically for use while they were stationed aboard and operated from the modified [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']].

Developed by Wraith pilot [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Garik Loran]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the tactic involved venting the atmosphere out of and opening the door for the corvette's bow hold, which had been modified to carry nine [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] instead of the four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] that the warship had held while in service with [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] (itself a modification of the standard Corellian Corvette design). The fighters were then used as static torpedo launchers, allowing the corvette to unleash as many as eighteen [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] in a single attack.

The tactic was used on two known occasions; first during the [[Battle of Talasea]], where the tactic was created, and again at the [[Battle of Ession]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
